width.$description: Stroke width scale — thin for default surfaces, medium for focus, thick for errors

thin.$description: Default stroke for cards, inputs, and dividers

medium.$description: Emphasis stroke for focused or selected states

thick.$description: Strong stroke for error borders and active indicators

style.$description: Border style vocabulary — solid for most surfaces, dashed for placeholder zones

solid.$description: Standard solid border for most UI surfaces

dashed.$description: Dashed border for placeholder zones and drop targets
